speaker: MATT
raw_text: I would like you all to roll initiative, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Totally good.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No problem with our setup.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was the third spell, by the way. Detect Good and Evil.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, there you go. So how many spells do you have left?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No spells. I've got cantrips though, so don't worry, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No burger left. Just onion rings.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just the fried piece. Not even an onion left in there.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll do it! Because I like witch huts, I'll do it. What's yours?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm not used to you being a human.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He basically saw it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know. It worked out fine for the narrative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll go for it. I don't get advantage on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, okay. God. Six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's too dark to see anything, even with your darkvision. It looks like a ruin. It could very well be that this island is abandoned.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does it look like, when we get up close to it, like it's caved in on top?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It looks like whatever roof was has fallen in, and all there are are some semblances of the wall still standing, and corners to the structure, but most of it is either crumbled in entirely--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, this is like a famine home in Ireland. You can see the edges of it, probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord, give me a boost.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Getting up on the roof.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You climb up onto-- there is no roof to it, per se. It's all fallen in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a full hut with a witch inside, Matt. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You want me to put a witch in this? You want me to throw a witch in this? There can be a witch, Sam!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a full, two-story hut with a burning fireplace.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll pull out the Baba Yaga, give me five seconds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I got rules for this shit in the book.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You hear a dice fall, "And... six witches come out."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, going back to my first campaign. Roll for number of witches. As you vault up to the top edge of one of the stronger walls, you head up onto the side and glance to the back, right as a pair of red eyes (whoosh) right up at you, and this (growling).

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We know that sound.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You suffer seven points of piercing damage, and I need you to roll a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the creature pulls its jammed hand out of the ground after trying to strike at Jester, it turns around to watch as you approach, and as you hold the pommel outward, the blast, lighting up its jaw, its eyes go to a bright pink with fear as it recoils from the blast. As it hits, the blast seems to be absorbed by its blubberous form. This crack begins to (cracking) across its body. It's trying to hold itself together, and the scales begin to turn to ash. Like the inside of it burning out like the end of a cigarette, the embers glowing, incinerating the interior of its body as it slowly tries to hold its body together. It falls to its knees and then slowly the rest of its body tumbles away into ash and dust.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There is no body?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The whole body doesn't burn away.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We need a body!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The wound where it impacted is burned up at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh thank god. Is that imp still there? Is the imp still active?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two imps are still active, yes. That ends your turn, Fjord?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That imp is going to go after Nott, who is currently protecting the body.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to Blood Maledict. I'm going to Curse of the Eyeless on that imp.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which one, the one that is attacking Nott?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The one that is attacking Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so disadvantage on that one. That puts it at 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As its eyes cloud over, it swings with its stinger and you feel it just barely hit the tip of your hood and pull it back. But no impact from the stinger. One will attack you, Fjord. That is an 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That will hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You motherfucker.
